subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Lord--exalted be His majesty--Who hath, through the sending forth of His Messengers, made clear the pathways [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت باری جلت عظمته را لایق و سزاست که بارسال رسل سبل را واضح فرمود و
